texto: Men are frightful nuisances at times
autor: how much simpler life would be if we women did not have to make allowances for their little peculiarities.
explicacao: Citação de how much simpler life would be if we women did not have to make allowances for their little peculiarities. sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “Men are frightful nuisances at times” articula reflexao, elizabeth-peters, frightful em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
